series_metadata.series_title: School File for Sponsored Community Schools
series_metadata.series_description: Contract, application correspondence, compliance documents and any other documents related to the sponsorship of a community school by the Office of School Sponsorship.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two years from date of expiration of Office of School Sponsorship, which may include non-renewal, termination, or closure. ; Electronic: two years from date of expiration of Office of School Sponsorship, which may include non-renewal, termination, or closure
